string.text: %c[ui_gray_1]Fair Fast Travel is replaced by %c[pda_yellow]Dorn's Fast Travel%c[ui_gray_1].\n \n%c[pda_white]See %c[pda_yellow]PDA Guide > Addons > Dorn's Fast Travel%c[pda_white] for how travel works.

%c[ui_gray_1] 
%c[pda_yellow]Dorn's Fast Travel%c[ui_gray_1] lets you skip the tedium of (some) travel while retaining some risk and immersion.


%c[pda_green]HOW TO TRAVEL
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Open the PDA map and %c[pda_yellow]right-click%c[ui_gray_2] a destination - bases, campfires, zone exits, or your own stashes (works with anomalous stashes).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Travel here%c[ui_gray_2]: Can only be used on the current map. Free. %c[pda_yellow]Fast - 30 minutes per km%c[ui_gray_2]. You will be ambushed by any hostiles you meet along the way.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Sneak here%c[ui_gray_2]: Can only be used on the current map. Free. %c[pda_yellow]Slow - 3 hours per km%c[ui_gray_2]. You have a chance to avoid hostile encounters.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Hire guide%c[ui_gray_2]: Hire a guide to safely and instantly take you to any base or stash in the game - he will also help you carry your stuff so there's no weight ristriction. %c[pda_yellow]3000 RU per km, 1 hour per km%c[ui_gray_2].


%c[pda_green]PDA SHOWS YOU JOURNEY
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]The PDA map shows the journey you're taking along a real path across the map. You can see the intended path in grey, and watch it change to green as you make progress.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Sneaking progresses much slower than normal travel on the PDA which matches the time that will pass when your journey is complete.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Press Escape or right-click and select 'Cancel journey' to stop your journey.


%c[pda_green]TRAVEL EFFECTORS
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Cannot travel during an emission.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Cannot travel when hostiles are too close.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Cannot travel when you are over encumbered (matches when you cannot move normally).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]20% slower when carry weight is yellow (within 10 kg of max carry weight).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]50% slower when carry weight is red (over max carry weight).


%c[pda_green]AMBUSHES
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]During a normal travel, hostiles will detect you if you travel within 60 meters of them. When this happens they will ambush you (you will be dropped short of your destination to confront the enemy). This range is reduced by environmental factors:
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Time: Night -20m (7pm-7am). Twilight -10m (6-7pm, 7-8am).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Weather: Rain -10m, Storm -15m, Fog -20m.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Your base sneak chance is 20%, but is increased by your Sneaking level (3%% per level).


%c[pda_green]SNEAKING SKILL
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Your skills UI will show a new 'Sneaking' skill (%c[pda_yellow]K%c[ui_gray_2] by default).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Exp is gained by avoiding hostile encounters during travel (20 exp) or getting ambushed (10 exp).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Each level adds:
 %c[pda_white] - %c[pda_yellow]+3%%%c[ui_gray_2] chance to avoid hostile encounters when sneaking.
 %c[pda_white] - %c[pda_yellow]+2%%%c[ui_gray_2] PDA sneaking progress speed (and thus reduces how much time/thirt/hunger/sleep you spend).
 %c[pda_white] - %c[pda_yellow]+1%c[ui_gray_2] to how many meters away an ambush will happen (making them less dangerous).


%c[pda_white]Good luck stalker...
